arts.ttl: I never expected to join Manchester United - one phone call from Erik ten Hag changed everything
arts.sum: One member of Erik ten Hag's backroom staff says he was left stunned after being offered a job at Man United.

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Twente
arts.sum: The Dutch side, who United boss Erik ten Hag represented as a player, should be no match for one of the richest squads in world football but it's up to the Red Devils to ensure the Eredivisie outfit leave Old Trafford unhappy. Manchester United will be aiming to make the perfect start to their Europa League campaign when they face FC Twente at Old Trafford on Wednesday evening.

arts.ttl: Match summary: Doncaster v Man Utd
arts.sum: With 17 minutes remaining, United progressed down the right through Mather and Ennis finished well to spark more noise from the away fans behind the goal. Mee pushed away an effort by Hurst but a lapse at the back allowed Broadbent to clinically take advantage with a long-ranger, yet United refused to buckle.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Watford bizarrely hijacked by FC Twente ultras as Dutch fans take over Etihad before Utd clash
arts.sum: Some Twente fans decided to make it two games in two days with a trip to the Etihad

arts.ttl: Leny Yoro tells Man United supporters what to expect on his return as injury update given
arts.sum: The defender has yet to make his Manchester United debut but has given supporters a lot to be excited about when he returns from injury.

arts.ttl: Manchester United may have found another first-team winger after signing him from Liverpool
arts.sum: Man United's U21s drew 3-3 against Doncaster in the EFL Trophy before prevailing on penalties in another uplifting night for the academy.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag offers new estimate on Luke Shaw's return from injury
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag is hopeful of having Luke Shaw back from injury in the coming weeks, but there are still no guarantees over the left-back’s fitness. The original estimate for Shaw to return was following the September international break, but that time came and went.

arts.ttl: 4 FC Twente star Man Utd should watch out for in Europa League
arts.sum: The 27-year-old's ten goals in 18 league appearances in the second half of the 2023/24 campaign earned him a move to FC Twente over the summer, and he's continued his fine form at his new club too, by scoring three in six thus far. The 22-year-old's exceptional tally of 17 goals and three assists from attacking midfield is the reason FC Twente qualified for the Europa League, and if he can bring his fine domestic form onto the European stage, he'll cause United some problems on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man Utd Eyeing 2025 Move for 'Insane' 55m Forward
arts.sum: Manchester United have two strikers in their ranks already but they haven't given up hopes of signing a third in Benjamin Sesko

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester United vs. FC Twente injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Europa League clash between Manchester United and FC Twente.
